title: 開けあらAkeara 開けあら
description: A texturepack for Youtuber Akeara.  Also a red themed pvp resourcepack
body:
![Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Yw1dGsa1/images/25794816092d6c57f912c98d3011c5bf0d88f0ee.png)

A texturepack for PvP Youtuber Akeara!  This is also a red themed resourcepack.  
It includes:

1. Low Fire
2. No Explosion Particles
3. Custom End Crystal
4. 3D End Crystal Item
5. Custom Crit and Totem pop particles
6. Better Ore Textures

And More!
**View The Gallery To See More!**

Enjoy!


Texture credit to xSpinHDx for the [original](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/transparent-inventorys) gui, hud and inventory textures!
